---
name: Accessibility Issue
about: Report an accessibility issue with this project
title: ''
labels: accessibility
assignees: ''

---

## Accessibility Issue

**What accessibility issue did you encounter?**

**Where did you encounter this issue?**
- [ ] Website
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Code
- [ ] Forms
- [ ] Images
- [ ] Videos
- [ ] Interactive elements
- [ ] Navigation
- [ ] Content
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**What assistive technology were you using?**
- [ ] Screen reader
- [ ] Voice control
- [ ] Keyboard navigation
- [ ] High contrast mode
- [ ] Magnification
- [ ] Switch device
- [ ] Speech recognition
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See accessibility issue

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Actual behavior**
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the accessibility issue.

**Environment**
- OS: [e.g. Windows, macOS, Linux]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Firefox, Safari]
- Version: [e.g. 22]
- Assistive technology version: [e.g. NVDA 2023.1]

**WCAG guidelines affected**
Which WCAG guidelines does this issue violate?

**Priority level**
- [ ] Critical (blocks users)
- [ ] High (significantly impacts users)
- [ ] Medium (moderate impact)
- [ ] Low (minor issue)

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the accessibility issue here.

**Note**: Accessibility issues affect users with disabilities and should be addressed promptly!

**Note**: Accessibility is not just good practice, it's a legal requirement in many places!

**Note**: Test with real users and assistive technologies when possible!

**Note**: Accessibility benefits all users, not just those with disabilities!
